title: stevia lasioclada
intro: Stevia lasioclada, also known as the paraguayan stevia, is a plant species in the genus Stevia, native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Stevia lasioclada include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Stevia lasioclada can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
